predicate: non-generic subagent_type AND (exact [a-z0-9-]+ token of ref, len>=3  OR  task_id substring of ref, len>=8)

vectors.label: bundled bare name 'appsec-lane' by NAME token
vectors.ref: consulted the appsec-lane, independent agent context

vectors.label: bundled namespaced 'passet:appsec-lane' by NAME (colon splits -> bare token 'appsec-lane' matches? NO: recorded st keeps colon)
bundled namespaced reconciles by opaque ID substring instead
org 'acme:appsec-reviewer' recorded BARE token matches ref bare token

vectors.label: org 'acme:appsec-reviewer' recorded WITH namespace: name fails (colon token != bare tokens), needs id
org 'acme:appsec-reviewer' namespace-recorded but ID present in ref -> reconciles by id
org specialist with NO appsec in the name at all (name token match) -> still reconciles (name-agnostic)
generic lane 'code-reviewer' named -> NOT a specialist (generic)
EMPTY ledger (sidecar wired, nothing spawned) -> reconciles to nothing
look-alike: recorded 'security-reviewer' vs ref token 'security-review' -> different token -> False
short recorded name 'sec' cannot substring-match 'secrets' prose -> False
short task_id (< MIN_TASK_ID=8) cannot id-match -> False
None subagent_type never certifies (even with a matching id)
